DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-17-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ELLIE MAE INC. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Appearances: Joel David Deutsch, Esq. of JMBM, (310) 201-3579 appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Taryn Lam, Esq. and Jennifer P. Gossain, Esq. of White & Case LLP (650) 213-0327 appearing for Defendant and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer to the second cause of action is overruled, defendant has until December 7, 2009 for the defendant to file amended answer. The second cause of action sufficiently alleges facts that are not preempted by the trade secrets statute. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/HEK)JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, REPORTER: BRENDA FIELDS, CSR # 7235
